title: rubus niveus var. sericeus
intro: Rubus niveus var. sericeus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a plant species in the rose family native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus niveus var. sericeus include its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and fruits can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
